verses.text: Biakna tau gei-ah Topa a ding ka mu a, hih bangin thu hong pia hi: “Biakinn bulpi khempeuh a kilin' theihna dingin biakinn khuampiluzang nakpi takin satgawp in. Tuate satkham in la, mite' luzang tusak in. Tua lai panin a suakta teng galsungah ka sisak ding hi. A taikhia, a suakta, kuamah omlo ding hi
Lei tosukin misite' omna Leinuai-ah a va tun' uh hangin tua lai-ah amaute ka su ding a, vantungah a kahtoh uh hangin zong, tua lai mahah amaute ka su veve ding hi
Karmel mual dawnah a buk uh hangin, amaute zongin ka mankhia ding a, keima kiang panin tuipi tawng sungah bu ta le uh zong, tuipi gulpite in a tukna ding thu ka pia ding hi
Galte in a sal dingin hingmat ta le uh zong, namsau tawh a thahna dingun thu ka pia ding hi. Amaute' hoihna ding ngaihsun hetloin, amaute suksiat ding ka sawm hi,” a ci hi
Vanglian Topa Pasian in leitung a lawn' ciangin tuisuak a, leitunga om mi khempeuh a kap uh hi. Nail Gunpi bangin leitung buppi khangto-in kiamsuk ding hi
Topa in vantungah a inndeite bawl a, van kuumpi tawh leitung a khuhsuk hi. Amah in tuipi panin tuite samkhia a, leitung khempeuhah tua tuite a sung hi. Hih bangin a bawlpa' min pen Topa ahi hi

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite aw, Ethiopia mite tawh a kibangin note ka hong bawl a, Egypt gam panin note kong paikhiatpih bangin, Kaftor gam panin Filistia mite ka paikhiatpih a, Kir gam panin Syria mite ka paikhiatpih hi
Keimah in hih a khial Israel kumpi gam ka encik a, hih leitung panin amaute ka susia ding hi. Ahi zongin a vekpi-un susiamang loin pawlkhat ka sitlai ding hi
Keimah in thu ka pia ding a, anhaihna ciang tawh an a kihaih mah bangin keimah in Israel mite ka lok niloh ding hi. A hoihlo teng a kipaihkhiat theihna dingin minam dangte lakah ka haih ding hi
Keima mite' sung panin, “I tungah siatna hong tung ngeilo ding hi,” a ci mawhneite khempeuh, galsungah si ding uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Israel-te A Ngei uh Bangkik Ding

verses.text: Tua ciangin inn tawh kibangin a siasa David ukna gam keimah in ka puahkik ding a, a vang teng hu-in, a sia teng ka puahkik ding a, a nidanga a ngeina lui mah uh ka bangsak kik ding hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite in Edom gam a omlaiteng leh keima mi ahi ngei minam khempeuh zo-in ngahkik ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: An a kihauh luat manin, anlak a kizawh ma-in lo khawhkik hun tungin, leenggahte, leenggahzu-a bawl a kizawh ma-in a suankik hun hong tun' ding, hun nuam hong tungta ding hi. Mual lian khempeuh panin leenggahzu khum hong taakkhia-in, mual neu khempeuh tungah leenggahzu a luang ding hi
Ka mi Israel-te, amau' gam ka tun'kik ding a, a kisia a khuapite uh hoihtakin lampha kikin a sungah a teng ding uh hi. Amaute in leenggui suanin, huan bawlin, a sunga piangte a ne ding uh hi
Amaute-a' dingin ka piak gamsungah amaute ka koihkik ding a, tua ka piaksa gam panin kuamah in amaute lakhia kik nawnlo ding hi, Topa, note' Pasian in ci hi, a ci hi.
